query: Temu US direct sales cease date May 2025 de minimis exemption Trump

reasoning: Both sets contain the core answer (Temu halted direct-from-China shipments on May 2, 2025, due to the end of the de minimis exemption) via the BBC article and CNN/Forbes coverage of the later August suspension.
